nasb.text: Because they had rebelled against the words of God And spurned the counsel of the Most High.

esv.text: for they had rebelled against the words of God, and spurned the counsel of the Most High.

cnv.text: 因為他們違背了　神的話， 藐視了至高者的旨意。

ccb.text: 因为他们违背上帝的话， 藐视至高者的旨意，

csbs.text: 他们悖逆了神的言语， 藐视至高者的旨意；
